testcase.name: Example #1.3
testcase.system-out:

15:04:26.944 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-1] INFO c.b.group2.utils.ConfigManager - Loading configuration for environment: dev 15:04:26.983 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-1] INFO com.bootcamp.group2.hooks.Hooks - Suite started | env=dev | platform=MOBILE

testcase.name: Mobile login successful with valid credentials
Forgot Password button is visible on mobile login page
Mobile login fails with incorrect password
Mobile login fails with unregistered email
Mobile login fails with empty email
Mobile login fails with empty password
Berhasil mengakses halaman Ajukan Sakit
testcase.system-out: @mobile @sakit Scenario: Berhasil mengakses halaman Ajukan Sakit &amp#27;[90m# features/ui/mobile/m_sakit/sakit.feature:8&amp#27;[0m 15:04:27.407 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO com.bootcamp.group2.hooks.Hooks - Starting: Berhasil mengakses halaman Ajukan Sakit 15:04:27.415 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO c.b.group2.utils.DriverFactory - Initializing WebDriver | browser=chrome | headless=false | remote=false | platform=MOBILE 15:04:29.038 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO c.b.group2.utils.DriverFactory - WebDriver successfully initialized for thread: ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3 15:04:29.100 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO c.b.g.p.mobile.login.MobileLoginPage - Opening URL: https://magang.dikahadir.com/absen/login &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser logs in using valid mobile credentials&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.bootcamp.group2.steps.ui.mobile.login.MobileLoginSteps.userLogsInUsingValidMobileCredentials()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser successfully navigates to mobile dashboard&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.bootcamp.group2.steps.ui.mobile.login.MobileLoginSteps.userSuccessfullyNavigatesToMobileDashboard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser clicks menu Sakit&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.bootcamp.group2.steps.ui.mobile.m_sakit.MobileMenuSakitSteps.userClicksMenuSakit()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser clicks button Ajukan Sakit&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.bootcamp.group2.steps.ui.mobile.m_sakit.MobileMenuSakitSteps.userClicksButtonAjukanSakit()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser clicks Access Alarm icon&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.bootcamp.group2.steps.ui.mobile.m_sakit.MobileMenuSakitSteps.userClicksAccessAlarmIcon()&amp#27;[0m 15:04:31.829 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO c.b.group2.utils.DriverFactory - Closing WebDriver for thread: ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3 15:04:31.991 [ForkJoinPool-2-worker-3] INFO com.bootcamp.group2.hooks.Hooks - Finished: Berhasil mengakses halaman Ajukan Sakit — Status: PASSED
testcase.system-err: Jun 26, 2026 3:04:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jun 26, 2026 3:04:28 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.155. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
